dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The rules-context-loader step was executed successfully with schema validation, indicating that the agent successfully incorporated governance rules into the context, a direct improvement over the baseline.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map step failed due to a JSON parse failure. This failure prevents the agent from establishing the causal link between work items and architecture evolution, which is central to the orchestration flow.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Despite the failure in the evolution mapping, the alignment-engine and architecture-intent-generator both completed successfully, processing over 43,000 combined tokens. This suggests the agent was still able to evaluate general alignment and intent, though likely with incomplete context from the work mapping.
